headline: Let's talk about your project — for free.
subheadline: Send me a message and we'll hop on a quick call. No commitment, no invoice. Just an honest conversation about what you're building.
perk-call-desc: We'll jump on a call to discuss your project, goals, and timeline — completely free.
perk-response-desc: I personally read every message and get back to you fast.
perk-commit-desc: Talk to me first. If it's a fit, great. If not, no hard feelings.
form-subtitle: Fill out the form and I'll reach out to schedule a free call.
placeholder-message: Tell me briefly what you need — type of website, goals, timeline, or any questions you have.
error-msg: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.
success-desc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours to schedule our free call.
